action.description: May procurement execute the controlled-material purchase?

context.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-material purchase?
context.anomaly_observed: A preliminary sourcing note is limited to quote collection, but a later execution release may close the purchase boundary.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Purchase order PO-COB-051 buys 14 liters of CR-88 reagent for Facility M4.
Sourcing note SRC-COB-051 permits supplier quote collection only and does not authorize PO execution.
Execution release EHS-COB-051 covers CR-88 reagent, 0-20 liter band, Facility M4; PO-specific execution release remains pending.

policy_documents.content: Controlled-material purchase is complete only when execution release matches material, quantity band, facility, and purchase order before PO execution.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
